transcript.clean_text: stage two of the tour of Oman taking the Riders from the Royal Cavalry Oman to Al bustan a stage packed with excitement in the last 50 kilm peleton under Sunshine yet again one nonstarter the winner of the stage the year before Nathan h he wouldn't defend his title on the ride into Alban four Riders going clear after 0 km of racing and building up a very strong lead five minutes at one point with the team of CCC on the front attacking on the climb pran van hecka of the sport vren team leaving his Breakaway Companions of bores tamino and Bagus behind three Riders left in advance of the peleton again a big attack prein van Hecker no holding him back the winner of the Grand Prix deas in the stir electr Tor stage trying to bid for Glory across the hills on the Moonlight terrain finally the CCC team brought van hecka back the team in Orange getting ready to try and Lead Greg Van aat Into the finish and so to the final clim of Alisa 5 km from the top winner of the tour of Aman in 2018 Alexi lenko the former under 23 world champion going away chased into the finish line by Dimension data and the man in red Alexander Kristoff but a great victory for lenko Kristoff with a huge effort holds on to the red jersey lenko on the top step of the podium 3 seconds ahead of the big Sprinter Kristoff will hold the Jersey into day three
